scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @labelhub/contracts typecheck && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-core typecheck && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-compiler typecheck && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-renderer typecheck && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-designer typecheck && npm run -w @labelhub/workflow-core typecheck
scripts.test: npm run -w @labelhub/contracts test && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-core test && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-compiler test && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-renderer test && npm run -w @labelhub/schema-designer test && npm run -w @labelhub/workflow-core test
